author: doll-agent
content:
Added tests/oracle_f32.rs covering 16 linalg ops on the f32 monomorphization: det, trace, inv, cholesky, matmul, dot, inner, outer, kron, vdot, norm, solve, matrix_rank, eigh, svd, qr.

Approach: fixtures stay float64 (single source of truth); helpers cast inputs and expected values down to f32 and compare with a 4096-ULP budget that absorbs the f32 precision gap (~7 vs ~15 digits). Per-case tolerance_ulps still applies via .max().

New ferray-test-oracle helpers:
- assert_f32_slice_ulp
- should_skip_f32 (accepts float32 and float64 fixtures)
- make_f32_array_from_any (native f32 column or f64 cast-down)

Results: 16/16 f32 tests passing first try, 21 f64 tests still passing, clippy clean across both crates. Commit 775e9d70.
